text:
***** A lot of people not getting shoutouts isn't justifying it, really.  My issue is that I provided the source for his work and he did nothing but watch it and then ask for subscribes.  In the case of channels like H3H3, at least he makes an effort to make his videos transformative by adding skits or jokes.  Charmx just watches it and that's about it.  I just feel like if you're garnering as many or more views off of someone else's content, saying the name of the channel and mentioning that you should check out the original is just common decency.  There's probably a reason he's on his second channel and, from my understanding, is hitting turbulence on his current channel.

In any case, I don't hate the guy or anything but I think if you're going to make a reaction channel in which you provide no commentary or transformative work, you can at least give vocal props to the channel that nudges your channel along.
author: @TheSepticFoundry

text:
There's a significant difference between YTP and reaction videos though. 

Firstly, It's not about using content, it's about using UNEDITED content in it's ENTIRETY without permission. They give little to no commentary, hell, most barely even give reactions and stare blankly at the screen the vast majority of the time.

The second, and most important reason, is that they are essentially funneling money that should have gone the the creation they're 'reacting' to. Nobody is going to watch the EXACT some video beginning to end twice and that's the only way this whole thing could even begin to be remotely fair. And no, the 'free advertising' thing doesn't hold up. That's like expecting people to go watch a movie when the trailer showed the entire length already.

'Complete re-structuring' is exactly what makes YTP'ing fair. It doesn't result in loss of revenue for another person because they haven't seen the original video, and might actually want to after it.

If you actually took the time to read this, thank you. Big fan :]

text: Myself and other people don't have a problem when the reactioner is only reacting to clips from a video. This encourages people watching the reaction video to go see whole thing themselves if it happened to perk their interest. However, there is a problem when the reactioner reacts to the whole UNCUT video in question. By doing that the viewer now has no reason to go see the original vid since they've just watched it in the reaction video. This is also problemsome when the reactioner gives little to no commentary or basically does nothing to add anything substantial to their reaction (basically just sits there and watches it silently or gives the occasional laugh). At that point they're basically freebooting the video and stealing all the views and ad-rev that rightfully belong to the OC.
